description: Proof construction checker — proof blocks, obligations, and verifiable artifacts

assume.effect: adds hypothesis to current proof block

assert_eq.effect: adds claim to current proof block

qed.effect: discharges current proof block; triggers flush of implicit block

proof_begin.effect: opens an explicit proof block (alternative to implicit accumulation)

proof_end.effect: closes an explicit proof block and triggers finalization

validity_rule: a proof block is valid iff it has at least one hypothesis, at least one claim, and qed() is present
error_on_undischarged: UndischargedObligation (recovered=true) when claims exist but qed() is absent
